key.name: toggle-raven
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to show or hide the Raven sidebar. Change with: gsettings set org.gnome.shell.extensions.raven-sidebar toggle-raven "['<Super>n']"

key.name: theme
key.description: Color theme for the Raven sidebar. 'system' follows org.gnome.desktop.interface color-scheme. Change with: gsettings set org.gnome.shell.extensions.raven-sidebar theme dark
